channel.title: Soul Time
channel.description:
Soul Time has been on air since September 1984, and is the longest running soul show in the world. It is produced and hosted by Vince Peach.

Soul Time plays a mixture of Northern soul, Motown and related styles, from the sixties to the modern day.

Original R&B, southern grooves and funk are also featured on Soul Time as well as a weekly gig guide of whats on in Melbourne and the rest of Australia

vince.peach@yahoo.com

item.title: Soul Time presented by the Lord of Jazz
item.author: Vince Peach

item.title: Soul Time: Satisfaction Guaranteed with Richard Ewart
item.author: Vince Peach

item.title: Sye Saxon presents Soul Time
item.description:
Lloyd Nolan- I Don't Know About You - King 45 1962

Ben Harper - I Can't Takit No Longer - Cenco 45 1961

Freddie Houston - Chills And Fever - Regency 45 1963

Gay Poppers - I Want To Know - Fire 45 1960

Miss LaVell - Stolen Love - Duke 45 1960

The "5" Royales - Take Me With You Baby - Home Of The Blues 45 1961

Eddie Kirk - Monkey Tonight- King 45 1964

Tiny Topsy - Just A Little Bit - Federal 45 1959

Nina Simone - Work Song - Colpix 45 1961

The Good Timers - Chain Of Fools - Atlantic 45 1968

Ray Barretto - Mercy, Mercy Baby - Fania 45 1968

Marry Clayton - I've Got My Eyes On You - Teldisc 45 1962

Billy Gales - I'm Hurting - Shock 45 1963

Ruby Lee - I'm Gonna Put A Watch On You (24 Hours A Day) - Poptone 45 1963

Betty Lavette - I Feel Good (All Over) - Pama 45 1968

Baby Washington - Think About The Good Times- Veep 45 1969

Lou Johnson- Magic Potion - Big Top 45 1963

J. J. Barnes & The Del Fi's - Rich 45  1961

Little Ann - Lean Lanky Daddy - Kent Select 45 2009

Wilson Pickett - Let Me Be Your Boy - Cub 45 1962

Owen Gray - Help Me - Island 45 1967

Trade Martin - Sixteen Tons - RCA Victor 45 1966

Loretta Williams - Baby - Jotis 45 1965

The Four Shells - Hot Dog (My Baby's Comin' Home) - Volt 45 1966

Danny White - Cracked Up Over You - Decca 45 1966

Joe Simon & Eugene Blacknells Band - Dot 45 1964

Larry Williams & Johnny Watson - Too Late - Okeh 45 1967

Eddie Holman - I Surrender - ABC 45 1969

Gladys Knight & The Pips - I Heard It Through The Grapevine- Soul 45 1967

Johnny Jones & The King Casuals - Brunswick 45 1968

Baby Huey & The Babysitters - Mighty Mighty Children - Pt 1 (Unite Yourself This Hour) Curtom 1969

Young Disciples & Co. Soul Band - Bang Bang Bang - Gateway 45 1969

Mickey & The Soul Generation - Iron Leg - Maxwell 45 1970

Sonny Jones - Sissy Walk - Scram 45 1969

Junior & The Classics - Kill The Pain - Magic Touch 45 1968

Syl Johnson - Sorry Bout Dat - Twilight 45 1967

Nancy - Trying To Keep From Crying - Mercede 45 1971

Winfield Parker - Shake That Thing- Arctic 45 1969 ( faded out)
item.author: Vince Peach

item.author: Vince Peach

item.title: The Queen is on her knees
